_doc: Shipped. distribution config + manual entries. This repo is PUBLIC — never add anyone here without their OK; self-serve subscribers land in the private eddiebelaval/shipped-subscribers repo and distribute-local.py merges both. See pipeline/DISTRIBUTION.md.
_send_mode_values: draft = routine creates a Gmail DRAFT to the list (Eddie hits send). off = no distribution. send = auto-send (do NOT use until Eddie explicitly enables).
